title: Report on Interaction with Health Workers
institution: Manikaka Topawala Institute of Nursing, CHARUSAT – Community Health Nursing

sections.section: B. Details of Health Worker Interacted

fields.label: Area Covered (Population / Villages)
fields.hint: Describe the population size and number of villages covered by the health worker

fields.label: General Objective
fields.hint: State the broad overall goal of the interaction with the health worker

fields.label: Specific Objectives
fields.hint: List the specific, measurable objectives of the interaction

fields.label: 1. Roles and Responsibilities
fields.hint: Describe the roles and responsibilities of the health worker as discussed during the interaction

fields.label: 2. Service Delivery Activities
fields.hint: Describe the service delivery activities performed by the health worker in the community

fields.label: 3. National Health Programs Involvement
fields.hint: Describe the health worker's involvement in national health programs — e.g. RMNCH+A, RBSK, Immunization, TB, Malaria, etc.

fields.label: 4. Community Interaction
fields.hint: Describe how the health worker interacts with the community — home visits, group meetings, awareness sessions, etc.

fields.label: 5. Coordination and Teamwork
fields.hint: Describe how the health worker coordinates with other health team members — ANM, Medical Officer, ICDS, etc.

fields.label: 6. Challenges Faced
fields.hint: Describe the challenges and difficulties faced by the health worker in performing their duties

fields.label: 7. Problem-Solving and Coping Mechanisms
fields.hint: Describe how the health worker deals with and overcomes the challenges they face

fields.label: 8. Achievements and Satisfaction
fields.hint: Describe the achievements and job satisfaction expressed by the health worker

fields.label: 9. Suggestions Given by Health Worker
fields.hint: Summarize the suggestions or recommendations provided by the health worker for improving community health services

fields.label: Observations about Communication Skills of Health Worker
fields.hint: Describe the verbal and non-verbal communication skills observed in the health worker during the interaction

fields.label: Professional Behavior and Attitude
fields.hint: Describe the professionalism, ethics, and attitude displayed by the health worker

fields.label: Community Rapport
fields.hint: Describe the relationship and rapport the health worker has built with the community

fields.label: Record Maintenance and Organization
fields.hint: Describe how the health worker maintains and organizes records, registers, and reports

fields.label: Strengths Identified
fields.hint: List the key strengths observed in the health worker

fields.label: Areas Needing Improvement
fields.hint: Identify areas where the health worker could improve their skills or approach

fields.label: What Did You Learn from This Interaction?
fields.hint: Describe the key learning points gained from the interaction with the health worker

fields.label: How Has It Improved Your Understanding of Community Health Nursing?
fields.hint: Reflect on how this experience has deepened your understanding of community health nursing concepts and practice

fields.label: Application of Theoretical Knowledge into Practice
fields.hint: Describe how the theoretical concepts learned in class were observed or applied during this interaction

fields.label: Personal Reflection on Experience
fields.hint: Share your personal thoughts, feelings, and insights gained from this interaction experience

fields.label: Conclusion
fields.hint: Summarize the overall experience — key takeaways, the health worker's contribution to community health, and how this interaction will influence your nursing practice
